languages.text: "За свою жизнь я повидала немало. Предложением союза зачастую можно добиться большего, чем объявлением войны. Вовремя заключенный договор стократ усилит ваше влияние — даже если это договор с противником. Особенно с противником".
languages.translation_comment:
Спикер: Камилла
НЕ играют DL_KamilleOnLariaSide или DL_KamilleArrestedOrDead
Выдаем Obj1_Cl_KamilleVoice

traits.locale_text: "За свою жизнь я повидала немало. Предложением союза зачастую можно добиться большего, чем объявлением войны. Вовремя заключенный договор стократ усилит ваше влияние — даже если это договор с противником. Особенно с противником".

languages.translation_comment:
Спикер: Камилла
НЕ играют DL_KamilleOnLariaSide или DL_KamilleArrestedOrDead
Выдаем Obj1_Cl_KamilleVoice

languages.text: "I have seen a great many things in my life. Proposing an alliance can often accomplish more than declaring war. A well-timed agreement will increase your influence a hundredfold — even one made with an enemy. Especially one made with an enemy."
languages.original_text: "За свою жизнь я повидала немало. Предложением союза зачастую можно добиться большего, чем объявлением войны. Вовремя заключенный договор стократ усилит ваше влияние — даже если это договор с противником. Особенно с противником".

traits.locale_text: "I have seen a great many things in my life. Proposing an alliance can often accomplish more than declaring war. A well-timed agreement will increase your influence a hundredfold — even one made with an enemy. Especially one made with an enemy."

"I have seen a great many things in my life. Proposing an alliance can often accomplish more than declaring war. A well-timed agreement will increase your influence a hundredfold — even one made with an enemy. Especially one made with an enemy."

"I have seen a great many things in my life. Proposing an alliance can often accomplish more than declaring war. A well-timed agreement will increase your influence a hundredfold — even one made with an enemy. Especially one made with an enemy."

languages.text: “我这一生，所见甚多。与其宣战，不如缔盟，这样往往能有更大的收益。一纸恰到好处的协议，足以让您的影响力倍增，尤其是在立约对象为敌人的情况下。”
languages.original_text: "I have seen a great many things in my life. Proposing an alliance can often accomplish more than declaring war. A well-timed agreement will increase your influence a hundredfold — even one made with an enemy. Especially one made with an enemy."

traits.locale_text: “我这一生，所见甚多。与其宣战，不如缔盟，这样往往能有更大的收益。一纸恰到好处的协议，足以让您的影响力倍增，尤其是在立约对象为敌人的情况下。”

languages.text: « J'ai vu bien des choses dans ma vie, et on obtient souvent plus en proposant une alliance qu'en déclarant la guerre. Un accord opportun décuplera votre influence, même avec un ennemi. Ou plutôt, surtout avec un ennemi. »
languages.original_text: "I have seen a great many things in my life. Proposing an alliance can often accomplish more than declaring war. A well-timed agreement will increase your influence a hundredfold — even one made with an enemy. Especially one made with an enemy."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai vu bien des choses dans ma vie, et on obtient souvent plus en proposant une alliance qu'en déclarant la guerre. Un accord opportun décuplera votre influence, même avec un ennemi. Ou plutôt, surtout avec un ennemi. »

languages.text: «He visto muchas cosas en esta vida. Proponer una alianza a menudo ofrece mejores resultados que declarar una guerra. Un acuerdo en el momento adecuado puede multiplicar la influencia por cien, aunque sea con un enemigo. Especialmente si es con un enemigo».
languages.original_text: "I have seen a great many things in my life. Proposing an alliance can often accomplish more than declaring war. A well-timed agreement will increase your influence a hundredfold — even one made with an enemy. Especially one made with an enemy."

traits.locale_text: «He visto muchas cosas en esta vida. Proponer una alianza a menudo ofrece mejores resultados que declarar una guerra. Un acuerdo en el momento adecuado puede multiplicar la influencia por cien, aunque sea con un enemigo. Especialmente si es con un enemigo».

languages.text: "Hayatımda pek çok şey gördüm. İttifak önermek, genellikle savaş ilan etmekten daha fazlasını başarır. Zamanlaması iyi ayarlanmış bir anlaşma, düşmanla yapılmış olsa bile nüfuzunuzu yüz kat artıracaktır. Hatta özellikle düşmanla yapılmışsa."
languages.original_text: "I have seen a great many things in my life. Proposing an alliance can often accomplish more than declaring war. A well-timed agreement will increase your influence a hundredfold — even one made with an enemy. Especially one made with an enemy."

traits.locale_text: "Hayatımda pek çok şey gördüm. İttifak önermek, genellikle savaş ilan etmekten daha fazlasını başarır. Zamanlaması iyi ayarlanmış bir anlaşma, düşmanla yapılmış olsa bile nüfuzunuzu yüz kat artıracaktır. Hatta özellikle düşmanla yapılmışsa."

languages.text: "Ich habe in meinem Leben schon viele Dinge gesehen. Eine Allianz kann oft mehr bewirken als eine Kriegserklärung. Eine Vereinbarung zum richtigen Zeitpunkt wird Euren Einfluss hundertfach stärken ... selbst wenn sie mit einem Feind geschlossen wird. Vor allem, wenn sie mit einem Feind geschlossen wird."
languages.original_text: "I have seen a great many things in my life. Proposing an alliance can often accomplish more than declaring war. A well-timed agreement will increase your influence a hundredfold — even one made with an enemy. Especially one made with an enemy."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe in meinem Leben schon viele Dinge gesehen. Eine Allianz kann oft mehr bewirken als eine Kriegserklärung. Eine Vereinbarung zum richtigen Zeitpunkt wird Euren Einfluss hundertfach stärken ... selbst wenn sie mit einem Feind geschlossen wird. Vor allem, wenn sie mit einem Feind geschlossen wird."

languages.text: 「人生で見たこと、たくさんある。同盟を提案するほうが、戦争を宣言するよりも、多くの場合、成果を上げやすい。タイミングの良い合意は、あなたの影響力を百倍にする。敵と結ぶ合意も、特に。」
languages.original_text: "I have seen a great many things in my life. Proposing an alliance can often accomplish more than declaring war. A well-timed agreement will increase your influence a hundredfold — even one made with an enemy. Especially one made with an enemy."

traits.locale_text: 「人生で見たこと、たくさんある。同盟を提案するほうが、戦争を宣言するよりも、多くの場合、成果を上げやすい。タイミングの良い合意は、あなたの影響力を百倍にする。敵と結ぶ合意も、特に。」
